title: Urbane Home Silicone Collapsible Popcorn Bowl

title: Amazon Brand - Vedaka Popcorn Kernels | 1 Kg
summary: Experience quality with Vedaka Popcorn Kernels; 1 kg pack perfect for your snack cravings Just heat up a small amount of oil in a pan, then add the popcorn kernels, and wait for them to pop!
